standard_name: DGMS Circular No. 02 of 2023 — Hazardous Zone Safety
title: Mandatory Continuous Flammable Gas Monitoring & Interlock in Zone 1 Hazardous Operations
matched_passage: In all continuous hydrocarbon and gaseous plant operations under DGMS jurisdiction, continuous gas monitoring sensors must be interlocked with active hot work permits. Whenever combustible gas levels reach or exceed 10% LEL (aggregated Z-score ≥ 3.0), all hot work permits in the affected zone shall stand automatically suspended.
statutory_authority: Directorate General of Mines Safety (DGMS), Ministry of Labour and Employment, Govt. of India

title: Permit-to-Work & Physical Isolation Controls for Maintenance Operations
matched_passage: No hot welding, cutting, or mechanical grinding maintenance shall be commenced on hydrocarbon process piping or pressure vessels unless positive physical blind isolation (spectacle blind / line break) is installed and verified by a licensed safety officer.
statutory_authority: Directorate General of Mines Safety (DGMS), Ministry of Labour and Employment, Govt. of India
